description: The Operations Director needs physical asset tags for the entire drone fleet. Generate a unique QR code for every aircraft in the Aerobridge database located at /opt/aerobridge. Each QR code must encode the full URL to the specific aircraft's Django admin detail page (e.g., http://localhost:8000/admin/registry/aircraft/<uuid>/change/). Save the QR codes as PNG images to /home/ga/Documents/fleet_tags/ with filenames following the pattern 'tag_<registration_mark>.png'. You may need to install the 'qrcode' Python library.
